headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on CenterPoint Energy, Raises Price Target to $45
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Nicholas Amicucci   maintains CenterPoint Energy (NYSE:CNP) with a In-Line and raises the price target from $44 to $45.
